languages.text: "Не могу знать, да и зачем мне? Уставом предписывается "испытывать полное доверие и глубочайшее почтение обмундированию и вооружению". Эти наушники нам от Первого Призыва достались. Мы обшили их тканью и закрыли защитным кожухом, чтобы сохраннее было".

"I wouldn't know, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, and why should I? The Handbook dictates that we 'put our complete trust and deepest reverence in our gear and armaments.' These ear mufflers are from the times of the First Call-Up. We sheathed them with fabric and covered them with a protective sleeve to preserve them better."
languages.original_text: "Не могу знать, да и зачем мне? Уставом предписывается "испытывать полное доверие и глубочайшее почтение обмундированию и вооружению". Эти наушники нам от Первого Призыва достались. Мы обшили их тканью и закрыли защитным кожухом, чтобы сохраннее было".

traits.locale_text: "I wouldn't know, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, and why should I? The Code dictates that we 'put our complete trust and deepest reverence in our gear and armaments.' These ear mufflers are from the times of the First Call-Up. We sheathed them with fabric and covered them with a protective sleeve to preserve them better."

"I wouldn't know, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, and why should I? The Code dictates that we 'put our complete trust and deepest reverence in our gear and armaments.' These ear mufflers are from the times of the First Call-Up. We sheathed them with fabric and covered them with a protective sleeve to preserve them better."

"The important thing here is the fibres of one particular rare root. There's something about them. We sheathed them with gaskets and fabric, covered them with a protective sleeve and used an old vox base to hold it all together."

"I wouldn't know, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, and why should I? The Code dictates that we 'put our complete trust and deepest reverence in our gear and armaments.' These ear mufflers are from the times of the First Call-Up. We sheathed them with fabric and covered them with a protective sleeve to preserve them better."

"I wouldn't know, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, and why should I? The Code dictates that we 'put our complete trust and deepest reverence in our gear and armaments.' These ear mufflers are from the times of the First Call-Up. We sheathed them with fabric and covered them with a protective sleeve to preserve them better."

"I wouldn't know, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, and why should I? The Handbook dictates that we 'put our complete trust and deepest reverence in our gear and armaments.' These ear mufflers are from the times of the First Call-Up. We sheathed them with fabric and covered them with a protective sleeve to preserve them better."

languages.text: 「ここで肝心なのは、ある希少な根の繊維だ。どこか特別なところがある。それをガスケットと布で被覆し、保護スリーブで包み、全部を古いヴォックスの基部でひとまとめに固定した」
languages.original_text: "The important thing here is the fibres of one particular rare root. There's something about them. We sheathed them with gaskets and fabric, covered them with a protective sleeve and used an old vox base to hold it all together."

traits.locale_text: 「ここで肝心なのは、ある希少な根の繊維だ。どこか特別なところがある。それをガスケットと布で被覆し、保護スリーブで包み、全部を古いヴォックスの基部でひとまとめに固定した。」

languages.text: « Je n'en ai pas la moindre idée, Votre Seigneurie, et pourquoi le saurais-je ? Le Manuel exige que nous "fassions entièrement confiance à notre matériel et à nos armes" et que nous les "respections au plus haut point". Ces cache-oreilles remontent à l'époque de la Première Mobilisation. Nous les avons recouverts de tissu et d'un manchon protecteur pour mieux les préserver. »
languages.original_text: "I wouldn't know, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, and why should I? The Handbook dictates that we 'put our complete trust and deepest reverence in our gear and armaments.' These ear mufflers are from the times of the First Call-Up. We sheathed them with fabric and covered them with a protective sleeve to preserve them better."

traits.locale_text: « Je n'en ai pas la moindre idée, Votre Seigneurie, et pourquoi le saurais-je ? Le Manuel exige que nous "fassions entièrement confiance à notre matériel et à nos armes" et que nous les "respections au plus haut point". Ces cache-oreilles remontent à l'époque de la Première Mobilisation. Nous les avons recouverts de tissu et d'un manchon protecteur pour mieux les préserver. »

languages.text: "Bilemem{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Neden bileyim ki? El Kitabı bize 'teçhizatımıza ve silahlarımıza tam bir güven ve derin bir saygı duymamızı' emreder. Bu kulak manşonu, İlk Sevk Grubu zamanından kalma. Daha iyi korunsunlar diye kumaşla kapladık ve koruyucu kılıf geçirdik."
languages.original_text: "I wouldn't know, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, and why should I? The Handbook dictates that we 'put our complete trust and deepest reverence in our gear and armaments.' These ear mufflers are from the times of the First Call-Up. We sheathed them with fabric and covered them with a protective sleeve to preserve them better."

traits.locale_text: "Bilemem{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Neden bileyim ki? El Kitabı bize 'teçhizatımıza ve silahlarımıza tam bir güven ve derin bir saygı duymamızı' emreder. Bu kulak manşonu, İlk Sevk Grubu zamanından kalma. Daha iyi korunsunlar diye kumaşla kapladık ve koruyucu kılıf geçirdik."

languages.text: "Das weiß ich nicht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, und warum auch? Das Handbuch besagt, dass 'unser volles Vertrauen und unser tiefer Respekt unserer Ausrüstung und Bewaffnung gelten soll'. Diese Ohrenschützer stammen aus der Zeit der Ersten Einberufung. Wir haben sie in Stoff eingeschlagen und mit einer Schutzhülle versehen, um sie besser zu erhalten."
languages.original_text: "I wouldn't know, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, and why should I? The Handbook dictates that we 'put our complete trust and deepest reverence in our gear and armaments.' These ear mufflers are from the times of the First Call-Up. We sheathed them with fabric and covered them with a protective sleeve to preserve them better."

traits.locale_text: "Das weiß ich nicht, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, und warum auch? Das Handbuch besagt, dass 'unser volles Vertrauen und unser tiefer Respekt unserer Ausrüstung und Bewaffnung gelten soll'. Diese Ohrenschützer stammen aus der Zeit der Ersten Einberufung. Wir haben sie in Stoff eingeschlagen und mit einer Schutzhülle versehen, um sie besser zu erhalten."

languages.text: «No lo sé, mi{mf|lord|lady}, y tampoco me corresponde saberlo. El manual exige que "depositemos plenamente nuestra confianza y reverencia en nuestro equipo y armamento". Estas orejeras datan de la era de los primeros llamados. Las envolvimos en tela y las cubrimos en una funda protectora para salvaguardarlas».
languages.original_text: "I wouldn't know, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, and why should I? The Handbook dictates that we 'put our complete trust and deepest reverence in our gear and armaments.' These ear mufflers are from the times of the First Call-Up. We sheathed them with fabric and covered them with a protective sleeve to preserve them better."

traits.locale_text: «No lo sé, mi{mf|lord|lady}, y tampoco me corresponde saberlo. El manual exige que "depositemos plenamente nuestra confianza y reverencia en nuestro equipo y armamento". Estas orejeras datan de la era de los primeros llamados. Las envolvimos en tela y las cubrimos en una funda protectora para salvaguardarlas».

languages.text: “这我可不知道，大人，再说我何必知道呢？《手册》规定我们要‘对本人的装备和军械抱有绝对信任与最高敬意。’这些耳罩是初代征召者时代传下来的。我们用布把它套起来，又加了一层保护套，好保存得更久些。”
languages.original_text: "I wouldn't know, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, and why should I? The Handbook dictates that we 'put our complete trust and deepest reverence in our gear and armaments.' These ear mufflers are from the times of the First Call-Up. We sheathed them with fabric and covered them with a protective sleeve to preserve them better."

traits.locale_text: “这我可不知道，大人，再说我何必知道呢？《手册》规定我们要‘对本人的装备和军械抱有绝对信任与最高敬意。’这些耳罩是初代征召者时代传下来的。我们用布把它套起来，又加了一层保护套，好保存得更久些。”
